Industrial Facilities

Industrial-scale security. Without the industrial-scale complexity.

Industrial facilities have dense asset inventories, shift-heavy guard workforces, critical IoT infrastructure, and serious compliance requirements. SYAG's platform handles all of it.

Key use cases

Asset-Heavy Operations

Industrial facilities manage hundreds of physical assets — machinery, vehicles, safety equipment, fire systems. SYAG's Asset Management module provides a structured registry with maintenance scheduling and lifecycle tracking.

IoT Event Management

Factory floor sensors, perimeter alarms, UPS systems, and generator monitors all generate events. SYAG normalises these events into a single incident pipeline and can automate responses via Flow rules.

Contractor Workforce Management

Industrial facilities often have large rotating contractor populations. SYAG's visitor management handles contractor access passes, zone restrictions, and automatic expiry when work permits end.

Compliance-Grade Incident Records

Industrial incident records must meet regulatory standards. SYAG's incident reports include full evidence chains, GPS-stamped timestamps, guard verification, and supervisor sign-off — all exportable as PDF for regulatory submission.

See SYAG for your industrial facility.
